clusters.name: classic_mas_without_llm
clusters.description: Multi-agent systems for cloud/edge resource management without LLM components (pre-agentic)
example_titles: Research on cloud computing resource management model based on multi-agent system
Application of multi-agent modeling to sociological research: A case study of community evolution
Multiply-sectioned Bayesian network for multi-agent learning based meta resources scheduling in CloudSim

clusters.name: cloud_devops_auxiliary
clusters.description: Cloud DevOps tasks (log analysis, incident triage, deployment automation) outside core resource management decisions
example_titles: Multiple intelligent agent coordination strategy for categorizing and searching appropriate cloud services
A modified cloud-based cryptographic agent for cloud data integrity
Load balancing, cost and response time minimisation issues in agent-based multi cloud service composition

clusters.name: robotics_edge_mobility
clusters.description: Robotics and mobile navigation systems using edge/cloud infrastructure (not resource management)
example_titles: Cloud computing support for the multi-agent robot navigation system
Cloud computing based on agent technology, super-recursive algorithms and DNA

clusters.name: network_telecom_telecom_focused
clusters.description: Network slicing, 5G/6G, RAN scheduling in telecommunications (not cloud/edge resource management)
example_titles: ABS: Agent-Based Scheduling for Data-Intensive Workflow in Software-as-a-Service Environments
A distributed multi-agents architecture for self healing healthcare data center
Towards a fairer negotiation for dynamic resource allocation in cloud by relying on trustworthiness
